headline: USTR opens review of Vietnamese wire, cable and connector imports
summary: A proposed 7% duty on selected Vietnamese-origin interconnect products is under public-comment review; no duty is currently collected.

headline: Chinese chip resistors and passives added to Section 301 list
summary: High-volume chip resistors and ferrite components from China now carry a 15% additional duty.

headline: Anti-dumping duty confirmed on tantalum capacitors from Malaysia
summary: Commerce finalises an 8% anti-dumping margin on tantalum capacitors of Malaysian origin.

headline: Anti-dumping duty reported on pcb & laminates from Malaysia
summary: A 4.8% anti-dumping duty affecting pcb & laminates of Malaysia origin has been recorded (in force).

headline: Anti-dumping duty on Thai aluminium extrusions confirmed
summary: A 9% anti-dumping margin applies to aluminium extrusions and heatsinks of Thai origin.

headline: USMCA review removes duty on qualifying Mexican polymer housings
summary: Qualifying polymer housings of Mexican origin see a 6% duty removed following a rules-of-origin determination — a downside-risk relief.

headline: Tariff-rate quota reported on inductors & transformers from Germany
summary: A 13.8% tariff-rate quota affecting inductors & transformers of Germany origin has been recorded (announced).

headline: Tariff-rate quota reported on capacitors from Japan
summary: A 4.5% tariff-rate quota affecting capacitors of Japan origin has been recorded (under review).

headline: China tightens export licensing on gallium and germanium inputs
summary: New export-licensing requirements on gallium- and germanium-based inputs raise effective landed costs and lead-time risk for downstream IC buyers.

headline: Section 301 list expanded to printed circuit boards of Chinese origin
summary: A 25% additional duty now applies to bare and assembled printed circuit boards imported from China under the latest Section 301 action.

headline: Anti-dumping duty reported on connectors from India
summary: A 6.7% anti-dumping duty affecting connectors of India origin has been recorded (in force).

headline: Proposed Section 232 expansion to steel fasteners and brackets
summary: A proposed 8% expansion of Section 232 steel measures to stamped hardware and fasteners is under review.

headline: Anti-dumping order issued on lithium-ion cells from China
summary: Commerce imposes a weighted-average anti-dumping margin of 18.4% on lithium-ion cells and packs from named Chinese exporters following a final affirmative determination.

headline: Section 232 aluminium duties extended to fabricated enclosures
summary: Fabricated aluminium enclosures and heatsinks of Chinese origin fall under the extended Section 232 aluminium measure at a 10% rate.

headline: Section 301 tariff reported on semiconductors/ics from Taiwan
summary: A 8.0% section 301 tariff affecting semiconductors/ics of Taiwan origin has been recorded (in force).

headline: Display modules of Chinese origin subject to Section 301 duty
summary: TFT-LCD and OLED display modules from China carry a 20% additional duty under Section 301.

headline: Section 301 tariff reported on semiconductors/ics from Vietnam
summary: A 9.0% section 301 tariff affecting semiconductors/ics of Vietnam origin has been recorded (in force).

headline: United States raises Section 301 duties on Chinese integrated circuits
summary: US Trade Representative confirms a 25% additional ad valorem duty on a range of Chinese-origin semiconductor devices, citing continued technology-transfer concerns.

headline: Preliminary anti-dumping margin announced on Chinese electrical connectors
summary: A preliminary 12.5% margin has been announced on board-to-board and power connectors from China; the order is not yet in force pending final determination.

headline: Tariff-rate quota applied to Korean magnetics above threshold
summary: Imports of Korean-origin transformers and inductors above the annual quota threshold attract a 5% over-quota rate.

headline: Earlier Section 301 duty on Chinese magnetics allowed to lapse
summary: A prior 10% duty on Chinese-origin inductors expired at the end of the exclusion window and is no longer collected.

headline: Proposed quota on advanced Japanese IC imports
summary: A proposed 3% over-quota rate on advanced Japanese ICs has been announced for consultation.

headline: Anti-dumping duty reported on resistors & passives from Philippines
summary: A 13.0% anti-dumping duty affecting resistors & passives of Philippines origin has been recorded (under review).

headline: Anti-dumping duty reported on insulated wire & cable from Thailand
summary: A 10.1% anti-dumping duty affecting insulated wire & cable of Thailand origin has been recorded (in force).

headline: Section 301 tariff reported on polymer housings from China
summary: A 5.4% section 301 tariff affecting polymer housings of China origin has been recorded (under review).

headline: Section 232 tariff reported on steel hardware from Mexico
summary: A 9.4% section 232 tariff affecting steel hardware of Mexico origin has been recorded (in force).

headline: Preliminary review of Taiwanese laminate imports announced
summary: A preliminary 4.5% margin has been floated on selected Taiwanese copper-clad laminates; not yet collected.

headline: Section 232 tariff reported on aluminium enclosures from Vietnam
summary: A 6.7% section 232 tariff affecting aluminium enclosures of Vietnam origin has been recorded (under review).

headline: Anti-dumping duty reported on display modules from South Korea
summary: A 11.4% anti-dumping duty affecting display modules of South Korea origin has been recorded (under review).

headline: Chinese multilayer ceramic capacitors added to Section 301 tariff list
summary: Passive components including MLCCs from China now carry a 15% additional duty, affecting high-volume board assemblies.
